summary: Completed testing of Account Marketplace + Service Request Pack. All features working correctly - marketplace renders product grid with View/Add to Cart buttons, cart shows items with 'Let Sales Assist Me' option, checkout form renders inside account shell, services page shows two-path chooser and dynamic service request form with service selector populated from backend templates.
critical_code_review_comments: AccountMarketplacePageV2.jsx uses hardcoded products array instead of fetching from /api/products - consider integrating with backend API for real product data
AccountCartPage.jsx uses hardcoded initialItems - cart state should be managed via CartProvider context for persistence across pages
ServiceDynamicRequestForm.jsx Submit Request button has no onClick handler - form submission not implemented yet

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All account pages render correctly with expected components

seed_data_creation: None - uses hardcoded product data in frontend components
context_for_next_testing_agent: Account Marketplace + Service Request Pack fully tested. Routes working: /account/marketplace (product grid with View/Add to Cart), /account/cart (cart with 'Let Sales Assist Me' option), /account/checkout (checkout form inside account shell), /account/services (two-path chooser + dynamic service request form). Service selector dropdown populates from /api/service-request-templates with 3 services: Garment Printing, Office Branding, General Service Request. Sidebar navigation includes: Dashboard, Marketplace (with EARN badge), Cart, Services, Let Sales Assist, My Orders, Quotes, Invoices, Recurring Plans, Referrals & Rewards, My Statement, Help.

GET /api/service-request-templates.details: Returns 200 with 3 templates: Garment Printing, Office Branding, General Service Request. Each template has service_key, service_name, and fields array with dynamic form fields.

/account/marketplace renders product gri.details: Product grid shows 3 products (Executive Office Chair, A4 Copier Paper Box, Reception Desk) with View and Add to Cart buttons for each.

/account/cart renders cart with items an.details: Cart page shows 'My Cart' title, cart items with Remove buttons, Estimated Total, 'Proceed to Checkout' and 'Let Sales Assist Me' buttons.

/account/checkout renders checkout form.details: Checkout page shows Delivery & Contact form (delivery address, contact phone, extra notes) and Order Summary with 'Continue to Invoice' button.

/account/services renders two-path choos.details: Services page shows two options: 'Fill the Request Form' with 'Start Request' button and 'Have Sales Contact Me' with 'Request Sales Assistance' button.

/account/services shows dynamic service.details: In-Account Service Request form with 'Choose Service' dropdown and dynamic fields that change based on selected service.

Service selector dropdown populates from.details: Dropdown shows 3 options from backend: Garment Printing, Office Branding, General Service Request. Selecting each service loads corresponding dynamic form fields.

Customer sidebar shows required navigati.details: Sidebar includes: Dashboard, Marketplace (with EARN badge), Cart, Services, Let Sales Assist, My Orders, Quotes, Invoices, Recurring Plans, Referrals & Rewards, My Statement, Help, and 'Request Business Pricing' CTA.
